calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing Brief
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Eric St. Peter.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Aloizio Costa, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Eric St. Peter.
Plaintiff's complaint for negligence, assault & battery, was filed on March 9, 2015, with substitute service of the summons, complaint and statement of damages on June 15, 2015.
Proof of Service of summons, complaint and statement of damages was filed with the Clerk's Office on November 19, 2015.
Default as to defendant Eric St. Peter was entered on February 10, 2016.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, January 3, 2019.
Statement of Damages was filed today, January 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Aloizio Costa, and against the Defaulted Defendant Eric St. Peter, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,000,000.00.
Costs - $753.70.
Punitive Damages - $100,000.00.

Total - $1,100,753.70.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Prove-Up Hearing Brief
